banner.caption: Content not available due to company out of business.

article.body:
Payment Service Integration

We work with various payment service providers (PSPs) to ensure users can buy and sell their crypto at the best rate. During my service at AAX.com, I worked with well-known PSPs such as Moonpay and Cabital. Other than working on code development, I was also actively engaged in requirement specification and direct communication with the analysts.

Learn more about Moonpay.

AAX Pay - Our own payment gateway

In addition to connecting payment service providers into our main trading platform, we are also working on our in-house payment gateway to devlier a seamless F2C services to our customers.
article.description: AAX was one of the top digital assets exchange back in early 2022, providing a wide range of products such as spot pairs, saving products, P2P fiat trading... etc. I was part of the payment products team in charge of integrating payment service providers into our platform to allow users buy and sell crypto at ease.
article.title: AAX.com
